title: Query performance <2s simple, <5s aggregate
evidence: McpServer.java and QueryEngine.java do not enforce per-query timeouts (spec requires <2s for simple, <5s for aggregate queries)
suggestion: Add query timeout wrapper in dispatch() method with configurable limits

title: Limited sample questions verification
evidence: Tests cover core functionality (matches, players, standings) but don't validate all 20+ sample questions from TASK.md sections
suggestion: Add integration tests for specific example queries like 'Flamengo vs Fluminense', 'average goals per match', and 'biggest wins'

title: Robust team name matching implemented
evidence: TeamNames.java:15-45 handles state suffixes (Palmeiras-SP → Palmeiras), country codes (Nacional URU → Nacional), and loose matching
suggestion: Exceeds spec requirements; supports cross-dataset team matching

title: Flexible date format support
evidence: CsvLoader.java:89-110 parseDate() handles ISO (2023-09-24), Brazilian (29/03/2003), and datetime with timestamps
suggestion: Handles all date formats mentioned in spec plus flexible timestamp parsing

title: All 6 CSV files loaded and queryable
evidence: CsvLoader.java:187-196 loads Brasileirão (4,180), Copa do Brasil (1,337), Libertadores (1,255), BR-Football (10,296), historical (6,886), FIFA (18,207)
suggestion: Full compliance with data coverage requirement; 23,568 matches and 18,207 players in memory
